game_info.title: Logic Is You
game_info.concept:
Baba Is You is a puzzle game where the rules you have to follow are present as blocks you can interact with. By manipulating them, you can change how the game works, repurpose things you find in the levels and cause surprising interactions! Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/736260/Baba_Is_You/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ Baba Is You is a puzzle game where the rules you have to follow are present as blocks you can interact with. By manipulating them, you can change how the game works, repurpose things you find in the levels and cause surprising interactions! Baba Is You is an award-winning puzzle game where you can change the rules by which you play. In every level, the rules themselves are present as blocks you can interact with; by manipulating them, you can change how the level works and cause surprising, unexpected interactions! With some simple block-pushing you can turn yourself into a rock, turn patches of grass into dangerously hot obstacles, and even change the goal you need to reach to something entirely different.



The game has over 200 levels that experiment with the game's mechanics in a multitude of ways, requiring the player to understand and manipulate the rules of the game and figure out devious ways to make the objects in the game world interact.



The game was originally created for and won the Nordic Game Jam 2017. Baba Is You also won the Excellence in Design and Best Student Game awards in the Independent Games Festival 2018, and was nominated a finalist in 2 other categories, including the Seumas McNally Grand Prize. The game was made using Multimedia Fusion 2 by Clickteam.
game_info.description: Logic Is You is a puzzle game where the rules of the world are physical objects present in the level. By rearranging words like "BABA", "IS", "YOU", "FLAG", and "WIN", you can change how the game works. Turn walls into ghosts, make rocks playable characters, or change the victory condition entirely. Your goal is to reach the object defined as "WIN" (usually the Flag) with the object defined as "YOU" (usually Baba).
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys: Move your character (the object defined as "YOU") and push blocks.
- Z: Undo the last move.
- R: Restart the current level.
- Space: Skip to next level (debug/cheat).
- ESC: Pause the game.
- Enter: Start game from title screen.

TEST_1.test_description: Verify basic movement and win condition.
TEST_1.strategy_description: On Level 1, move the character (Baba) directly to the Flag (WIN object) without modifying any rules.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game phase should transition to specific level completion state or load Level 2.
TEST_1.description: Verify basic movement and win condition.
TEST_1.strategy: On Level 1, move the character (Baba) directly to the Flag (WIN object) without modifying any rules.
TEST_1.expected: The game phase should transition to specific level completion state or load Level 2.

TEST_2.strategy_description: Push a "STOP" text block away from "WALL IS STOP" to break the rule, then walk through the wall.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should be able to occupy a grid cell previously occupied by a Wall.
TEST_2.strategy: Push a "STOP" text block away from "WALL IS STOP" to break the rule, then walk through the wall.
TEST_2.expected: The player should be able to occupy a grid cell previously occupied by a Wall.

TEST_3.strategy_description: Arrange text blocks to form "ROCK IS BABA".
TEST_3.expected_outcome: All Rock entities on the screen should transform into Baba entities, and the player should control multiple characters.
TEST_3.strategy: Arrange text blocks to form "ROCK IS BABA".
TEST_3.expected: All Rock entities on the screen should transform into Baba entities, and the player should control multiple characters.

TEST_4.strategy_description: Move the player 3 steps, then press Z 3 times.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: The game state (player position) should match the initial state.
TEST_4.strategy: Move the player 3 steps, then press Z 3 times.
TEST_4.expected: The game state (player position) should match the initial state.

TEST_5.strategy_description: Break "BABA IS YOU" and form "WALL IS YOU".
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Camera or focus should shift, and input should control Wall entities instead of Baba.

TEST_6.strategy_description: Move Baba into an object defined as "DEFEAT" (e.g. Water/Lava).
TEST_6.expected_outcome: The specific Baba entity should be destroyed. If no YOU entities remain, game over logic triggers (or level reset).
TEST_6.strategy: Move Baba into an object defined as "DEFEAT" (e.g. Water/Lava).
TEST_6.expected: The specific Baba entity should be destroyed. If no YOU entities remain, game over logic triggers (or level reset).
